selection_contract.refresh_note: Before a live scored sweep, refresh open_bug_count with the GitHub API or issue search for the target bug_query.

targets.label: microsoft/vscode
targets.notes: Large editor project with active issue triage and extension-heavy contributor paths.

targets.label: kubernetes/kubernetes
targets.notes: Large Go monorepo with operational personas, heavy test surfaces, and issue labels.

targets.label: nodejs/node
targets.notes: Runtime project with cross-platform build and regression-test expectations.

targets.label: tensorflow/tensorflow
targets.notes: ML framework with mixed Python/C++ workflows and heavy dependency-debugger value.

targets.label: pytorch/pytorch
targets.notes: Large ML framework with complex test selection and contributor onboarding needs.

targets.label: rust-lang/rust
targets.notes: Compiler project with strict review culture and rich diagnostics/regression tests.

targets.label: python/cpython
targets.notes: Interpreter project with mature contribution docs and high review expectations.

targets.label: ansible/ansible
targets.notes: Automation project with operator personas, modules, docs, and integration tests.

targets.label: grafana/grafana
targets.notes: Full-stack app with UI evidence, backend tests, and product-journey relevance.

targets.label: elastic/kibana
targets.notes: Large product repo with visual workflows, issue triage, and frontend/backend complexity.
